pr_text:
## Title: Fix integer underflow in LOG subsystem buffer management

### Summary
The LOG subsystem's memory logging mechanism uses a double-buffering scheme controlled by the `log_mem_side` variable. When this signed integer was used in buffer switching arithmetic (e.g., `1-log_mem_side`), it could underflow if corrupted or improperly initialized, producing an unexpectedly large unsigned value downstream. This underflow risked out-of-bounds access to the `log_mem_d[2]` array and potential segment
